parameters.content:
## [Utility] Send Email v1.0.0

Decoupled email sender — all workflows call this instead of hitting SendGrid directly.
To switch providers, change only this workflow.

**Inputs:** to, from, from_name (optional), subject, html
**Returns:** { success, status_code }

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { personalizations: [ { to: [ { email: $json.to } ] } ], from: { email: $json.from, name: $json.from_name || undefined }, subject: $json.subject, content: [ { type: 'text/html', value: $json.html } ] } }}

parameters.jsCode:
const resp = $input.first();
return [{ json: { success: true, status_code: resp.json?.statusCode ?? 202 } }];
